name: Pagination cursor exclusive/inclusive
goal: `pkg/page.py::slice_after` should return items after cursor (exclusive) but includes the cursor item. Fix exclusive semantics.
inspired_by: Pattern: cursor pagination inclusive vs exclusive off-by-one (GraphQL/REST list APIs). Synthetic.
